name: Columbus YMCA Fieldhouse
description: Columbus YMCA Fieldhouse is a place to play pickleball in Columbus, NE. There are 8 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The courts cannot be reserved. Players have access to locker rooms, restrooms, food, and lights.

name: Gerrard Park Pickleball Courts
description: Gerrard Park Pickleball Courts is a place to play pickleball in Columbus, NE. There are 3 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like lights and restrooms. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are free.
